license_activation_model: email OTP login, external HWH checkout, webhook-derived entitlement refresh
entitlement_model: HWH get-entitlement and consume-usage checks with webhook-confirmed active entitlement as the only Pro unlock source
pro_features: lifetime access to the current major version
paid_disclosure_copy: Upgrade opens the external HWH checkout in test mode until production payment is explicitly approved.
Refresh membership after payment; successUrl alone never unlocks Pro locally.
The extension does not process cards and does not ship payment or service-role secrets.
risk_notes: Production payment remains not verified; checkout mode must stay test or controlled until explicit approval.
Paid activation must remain webhook-derived; successUrl is informational only.
Local-only, no-upload, and no-cloud-sync claims must remain true in the actual bundle.
next_step: Run monetization:security-scan, premium packaging, listing quality gate, and keep production payment disabled until explicit launch approval.
